profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your personal information and display preferences
profile.fullNameHint: Your first and last name - used to identify your action items in meeting notes
profile.nicknameHint: Your nickname is displayed in the header and activity reports

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.dataDeleteWarning: This will permanently delete all your data. This action cannot be undone.
privacy.analyticsOptIn: Help improve Transitus with anonymous usage data
privacy.companionDataUsage: NRI Companion uses your data to provide personalized insights. Your data is never shared externally.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.accessibilityModeDescription: Enables enhanced contrast, larger touch targets, reduced motion, and screen reader optimizations.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: Set your local timezone for accurate date and time display
timezone.label: Your Timezone

password.title: Password
password.description: Change your password to keep your account secure
password.fillAllFields: Please fill in all password fields
password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.signOutAllDescription: Sign out of all devices and browsers
dangerZone.signOutAllConfirmDescription: This will sign you out of all devices and browsers, including this one. You'll need to sign in again.
dangerZone.leaveOrgConfirmDescription: You will lose access to this organization's data. A steward will need to re-invite you if you want to rejoin.
dangerZone.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all data
dangerZone.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove all of your data from our servers.

emailNotifications.title: Email Notifications
emailNotifications.description: Configure when you receive email notifications
emailNotifications.actionAlertsDesc: Get notified about overdue actions and stuck pipeline items
emailNotifications.activityUpdatesDesc: Receive notifications when others update your opportunities

addons.title: Add-Ons
addons.description: Add or remove capabilities from your subscription. Changes are prorated.
addons.tooltipWhat: Purchasable add-ons that extend your Transitus plan.
addons.tooltipWhy: Add capabilities like Bridge integrations, campaigns, or expanded AI without upgrading your base tier.

aiUsage.title: NRI Usage
aiUsage.tooltipContent: Your AI capacity scales with your active team size. More team members means more NRI conversations available each month.
aiUsage.description: Narrative Relational Intelligence — your monthly conversation pool
aiUsage.atLimit: Your monthly NRI pool has been reached. It will refresh at the start of your next billing period.
aiUsage.nearLimit: You're approaching this month's NRI capacity. Your pool grows with your team.
aiUsage.sharedPoolNote: Your capacity is part of a shared platform pool. As demand shifts, your allocation may adjust gently.

communio.title: Communio Awareness
communio.tooltipWhy: We share anonymized patterns — never identities.
communio.description: Receive gentle learnings from companions across the network
communio.label: Receive gentle learnings from the network
communio.privacy: We share anonymized patterns — never identities.

companion.title: Narrative Companion
companion.description: Gentle guidance while you work — optional and private.
companion.pausedByTenant: Companion guidance has been paused by your steward.
companion.enableDescription: When enabled, Transitus can offer small suggestions when you pause or get stuck. Nothing you write is used here. You can turn it off anytime.
companion.privacyNote: Companion Mode tracks only whether guidance was shown or dismissed — not what you wrote.

digest.title: Living Pulse Digest
digest.tooltipWhat: Regular email summaries of movement, reflections, and community signals.
digest.tooltipWhy: Gentle updates keep you connected to the story without needing to check the app.
digest.description: You decide how often Transitus speaks into your day.
digest.whatToIncludeDesc: Choose which threads of the story appear in your digest.
digest.footer: Every digest includes a link to manage your preferences. Individual details are never shared outside your community.

sections.visitsDesc: Movement from visits and care encounters
sections.essaysDesc: Essays and reflections ready for review

discovery.title: Discovery Keywords
discovery.tooltipWhat: Keywords that shape your discovery search results across events, grants, people, and organizations.
discovery.tooltipWhere: These are layered into every Perplexity search your team runs.
discovery.tooltipWhy: So discovery finds what matters to your mission — not generic results.
discovery.description: Discovery keywords help Transitus find events, grants, and partners aligned with your mission. Keywords are layered — your custom terms take priority.

layers.globalDesc: Standard nonprofit and community keywords applied to all tenants.
layers.enrichedDesc: Auto-extracted from your organization profile during enrichment.
layers.customDesc: Keywords you've added to fine-tune discovery results.

discovery.addPlaceholder: Add a keyword (e.g., refugee services, ESL programs)
discovery.countInfo: {{count}}/25 custom keywords · {{total}} total in stack · Press Enter to add
discovery.regenerated: Keywords regenerated from your organization profile
discovery.stoplisted: "{{keyword}}" is filtered — it may dilute discovery quality.

familia.title: Familia
familia.tooltipWhat: Optional organizational kinship — parishes, chapters, campuses.
familia.tooltipWhere: Visible here and in Communio when shared.
familia.description: Some organizations belong to a wider household. Familia helps you stay connected.
familia.leaveConfirmDesc: You can always rejoin later. Your data remains yours — nothing is shared or removed.
familia.error: Something did not go as expected

familiaSharing.title: Walking Together
familiaSharing.tooltipWhat: Share anonymized care patterns with your Familia.
familiaSharing.tooltipWhere: Aggregated signals visible to Familia members only.
familiaSharing.tooltipWhy: Helps your wider community notice emerging needs — individual details are never shared.
familiaSharing.description: Share aggregated stewardship signals with your Familia
familiaSharing.label: Share aggregated patterns
familiaSharing.privacy: This helps your wider community notice emerging needs. Individual details are never shared.

gmailAI.title: Gmail Email Analysis
gmailAI.description: Analyze your Gmail emails to suggest contacts, tasks, and follow-ups
gmailAI.connectFirst: Connect via Google Calendar Sync first
gmailAI.analysisEnabled: New emails will be analyzed for actionable insights
gmailAI.analysisDisabled: Enable to start analyzing emails for contacts and tasks
gmailAI.forwardOnlyDesc: Only emails received after {{date}} will be analyzed. Past emails are never processed for your privacy.
gmailAI.notConnectedDesc: To use Email Analysis, first connect your Google account via Calendar Sync. Go to Calendar page and click "Connect Google Calendar".

gmailOutreach.title: Gmail for Campaigns
gmailOutreach.description: Send email campaigns from your Gmail account
gmailOutreach.reconnectNeeded: Gmail needs reconnection. The sending permission scope was updated - please reconnect below.
gmailOutreach.notConnected: Gmail not connected. Connect your account to send campaigns.
gmailOutreach.connectedDesc: Your campaigns will be sent from this Gmail address. Reconnect to update permissions or use a different account.
gmailOutreach.disconnectedDesc: Connect your Google Workspace Gmail to send campaigns. This grants permission to send emails on your behalf.
gmailOutreach.scopeNote: Note: You'll be asked to grant permission to send emails. Only the "gmail.send" scope is used for campaigns.

googleCalendar.title: Google Calendar
googleCalendar.description: Sync your calendar for scheduling and meeting tracking
googleCalendar.notConnected: Google Calendar not connected. Connect to enable scheduling sync and meeting awareness.
googleCalendar.connectedDesc: Your calendar events are syncing. Reconnect to update permissions or switch accounts.
googleCalendar.disconnectedDesc: Connecting grants read access to your calendar events and the ability to create new ones for scheduling.
googleCalendar.gmailNote: This also connects Gmail for campaigns and email sync. One connection covers both.

google.title: Connect Google
google.description: Calendar sync, Gmail campaigns, and email analysis — one connection
google.notConnected: Not connected. Connect your Google account to enable calendar sync, email campaigns, and email analysis.
google.analyzingFrom: Analyzing emails received after {{date}}. Past emails are never processed.
google.oneConnectionNote: One connection grants calendar read/write, email sending for campaigns, and email analysis for contact suggestions.

hubspot.title: HubSpot Integration
hubspot.description: Keep your partner records in sync with HubSpot
hubspot.tooltipText: Sync your partners and contacts with HubSpot. Push your Profunda data, or optionally pull from HubSpot during migration.
hubspot.disconnectDesc: Syncing will stop. Your existing data in both systems will remain unchanged. You can reconnect anytime.
hubspot.syncModeTooltip: Company-first: each partner maps to a HubSpot Company. Deal-first: each partner maps to a Deal in a specific pipeline.
hubspot.twoWaySyncTooltip: Enable pulling data from HubSpot into Profunda. Useful when migrating away from HubSpot. Always requires preview before applying.
hubspot.pullModeWarning: Pull mode is designed for migration. It always requires a preview before any data is written to Profunda.
hubspot.whatToSyncTooltip: Choose which types of data are included in the sync. You can change this at any time.
hubspot.wouldOverwrite: ⚠ {{count}} field(s) would overwrite existing Profunda data

scope.reflectionsDesc: Safe summaries only (private notes are never shared)

ignoredDomains.title: Ignored Email Domains
ignoredDomains.description: Emails from these domains will be skipped during sync and analysis
ignoredDomains.label: Ignored domains
ignoredDomains.hint: Internal emails from your own organization are typically ignored to focus on external partner communications.

impactDimensions.title: Impact Dimensions
impactDimensions.tooltipWhat: Define structured metrics for your organization's impact.
impactDimensions.tooltipWhy: These appear on events, activities, and provisions — and feed your reports.
impactDimensions.description: Measure what matters in your work — without changing how Transitus stays simple.
impactDimensions.pageSubtitle: Measure what matters in your work
impactDimensions.yourDimensionsTooltipWhat: Structured metrics you define for your organization.
impactDimensions.yourDimensionsTooltipWhy: These appear on event, activity, and provision forms and feed your reports.
impactDimensions.pageDescription: Define how your organization measures impact — without changing how Transitus stays simple.
impactDimensions.noDimensions: No dimensions yet. Add one to start measuring your impact.
impactDimensions.newDimensionDesc: This will appear as an optional field on the relevant forms.
impactDimensions.publicEligibleNote: Counts only, never names or details.

missionIdentity.title: Mission Identity
missionIdentity.descriptionReadOnly: Your organization's archetype and relational focus
missionIdentity.description: How Transitus understands your organization's work and language
missionIdentity.tooltipWhat: Your mission archetype shapes journey stages, keyword sets, and narrative tone throughout Transitus.
missionIdentity.tooltipWhy: As your organization evolves, the system should evolve with you.
missionIdentity.adminOnly: Ask an admin to update these if your mission has shifted.
missionIdentity.changeNote: Changing your archetype adjusts suggested journey stages, discovery keywords, and narrative tone. Your existing data is never altered.

orientations.peopleFirstDesc: Relationships with individuals drive your mission
orientations.communityBasedDesc: Neighborhood and geographic presence drive your mission

narrativeCompanion.title: Narrative Companion
narrativeCompanion.description: Transitus listens alongside your existing system — never changes it.
narrativeCompanion.enableDesc: Allow Transitus to receive gentle signals from connected systems.
narrativeCompanion.noSystems: No systems connected yet. Visit your Activation Guide to get started.

outlook.title: Connect Outlook
outlook.tooltipWhat: Connect your Microsoft 365 account to send campaigns via Outlook.
outlook.tooltipWhy: Organizations using Microsoft 365 can send relationship-based campaigns directly from their Outlook account.
outlook.notConnected: Not connected. Connect your Microsoft 365 account to send campaigns via Outlook.
outlook.popupBlocked: Popup blocked. Please allow popups and try again.
outlook.disconnectDesc: A daily send limit of 300 messages protects your sender reputation.
outlook.connected365Note: Connect your Microsoft 365 account to send campaigns via Outlook.

provision.title: Shared Resources
provision.description: How do you want to track shared resources in your work?
provision.tooltipText: Choose how your organization tracks shared resources. This affects what fields appear when logging care, visits, and projects.
provision.catalogDesc: Organize resources into categories and items
provision.costFieldsDesc: Track cost awareness for stewardship reporting

modes.careDesc: Simply log how you've helped people — meals, clothing, support.
modes.stewardshipDesc: Track expenses and costs tied to the care you provide.
modes.enterpriseDesc: Manage items with pricing, categories, and a resource catalog.

pushNotifications.title: Push Notifications
pushNotifications.description: Receive alerts for important updates on Android Chrome
pushNotifications.blockedWarning: Notifications are blocked. Please enable them in your browser settings.
pushNotifications.notSupportedWarning: Push notifications are not supported in this browser. Try using Chrome on Android.
pushNotifications.watchlistSignalsDesc: Website change alerts for monitored orgs
pushNotifications.campaignSuggestionsDesc: New outreach ideas ready for review
pushNotifications.meetingNotesDesc: Read.ai notes and action items ingested
pushNotifications.overdueTasksDesc: Daily reminders for overdue and due-today tasks
pushNotifications.weeklyFocusPlanDesc: When your weekly plan is ready
pushNotifications.postEventFollowUpsDesc: After events when follow-ups are ready

readAI.title: Read.ai Integration
readAI.description: Automatically capture meeting notes and action items from Read.ai via Zapier
readAI.configuredNote: Your webhook key is active. For security, the key value is not displayed.
readAI.notConfiguredNote: Click "Generate Key" below to create your webhook key.
readAI.regenerateDesc: Create a new key if your current one is compromised
readAI.generateDesc: Generate a webhook key to enable the integration
readAI.regenerateConfirmDesc: This will invalidate your current webhook URL. You'll need to update the URL in Zapier.
readAI.generateConfirmDesc: This will create a new webhook key. Follow the setup instructions below to configure Zapier.
readAI.nameAliasesDesc: Alternative names to match in action items (e.g., Dan, Danny for Daniel)
readAI.step1Desc: Click "Generate Key" above. Your administrator will provide you with the complete webhook URL.
readAI.step2Title: Create a New Zap in Zapier
readAI.step2Desc: Go to Zapier and create a new Zap:
readAI.step5Desc: In the Data section, create these fields and map them to Read.ai values:
readAI.whatHappens: What Happens When a Meeting Ends
readAI.securityNote: Security Note: For your protection, webhook keys are write-only and never displayed after generation. Contact your administrator if you need to set up or update your Zapier integration.

recoveryBreadcrumbs.title: Recovery Breadcrumbs
recoveryBreadcrumbs.description: Help the assistant help you undo mistakes
recoveryBreadcrumbs.label: Help me undo mistakes (private action breadcrumbs)
recoveryBreadcrumbs.hint: Transitus stores a short list of recent actions (like "deleted a contact") so the assistant can help you restore work. It does not store message content, notes, names, or private details. Breadcrumbs are kept for 30 days and then permanently removed.
recoveryBreadcrumbs.enabled: Action breadcrumbs enabled — the assistant can help you undo mistakes.
recoveryBreadcrumbs.disabled: Action breadcrumbs disabled. The assistant will no longer see recent actions.
recoveryBreadcrumbs.saveFailed: Could not save preference. Please try again.

relationalFocus.title: Relational Focus
relationalFocus.tooltipWhat: Controls whether your workspace emphasizes people, organizations, or both in its narrative detail.
relationalFocus.tooltipWhy: Orientation drives entity page richness, compass weighting, and narrative density.
relationalFocus.autoManageDesc: When on, richness levels follow orientation defaults
relationalFocus.changeDesc: This adjusts how your workspace emphasizes people vs. organizations. No data is lost — only the narrative density and compass weighting will change.

searchKeywords.title: Search Keywords
searchKeywords.tooltipContent: These keywords help tailor discovery search results to your organization's focus areas. They're automatically extracted during identity enrichment, but you can add or remove them manually.
searchKeywords.description: Refine how discovery searches understand your organization's mission and community.
searchKeywords.noKeywords: No keywords yet. Enrich your organization profile or add them manually below.
searchKeywords.addPlaceholder: Add a keyword (e.g., refugee services, ESL programs)

simpleIntake.title: Simple Intake (Email Notes)
simpleIntake.tooltipContent: Accept notes by email from anyone on your team. People who prefer email can send visit notes, reflections, or updates without logging in.
simpleIntake.description: Accept notes from staff, visitors, partners, or volunteers — no login required.
simpleIntake.copyFailed: Could not copy — please select and copy manually

subscription.title: Plan & Billing
subscription.description: Your organization's subscription and plan details
subscription.tooltipContent: View your current Transitus plan, upgrade or add tiers, and manage billing through the customer portal.
subscription.operatorGrantedNote: Your organization has been granted access by the Transitus team. To upgrade or add capabilities, please reach out to your community steward.

teamCapacity.title: Team Capacity
teamCapacity.tooltipContent: Your active team capacity — stewards, shepherds, companions, and admins. Visitors, volunteers, and imported contacts are never counted.
teamCapacity.description: Capacity reflects your guiding team — not the number of people you serve.
teamCapacity.visitorNote: Visitors, volunteers, imported contacts, and email senders are always welcome and never count toward your capacity.

trustExport.title: Data & Trust
trustExport.tooltipWhat: Export all your relationship data - partners, people, activities, events.
trustExport.tooltipWhere: Downloads as a portable file you can keep.
trustExport.tooltipWhy: Your relationships belong to you. Always.
trustExport.description: Your data belongs to you. Export your relationships anytime.
trustExport.exportHint: Includes partners, people, activities, events, and a reflections summary. Full reflection content is kept private and not included in exports.
trustExport.exported: Your relationship data has been exported

voice.settingsDescription: Configure how voice notes work for your organization.
voice.enableVoiceNotesDesc: Allow visitors and staff to record voice notes.
voice.storeAudioFilesDesc: When disabled, audio is deleted after transcription. Only the transcript is kept.
voice.storeAudioTooltip: Controls whether original audio recordings are kept after transcription. When disabled, audio is deleted after transcription — only the text transcript is retained.
